chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2195 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.10329/2020: 2. For hearing of main case: 22.04.2020: Mr. Arshad Tayebaly, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shah, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Mansoob Hussain Siddiqui, Director General, Directorate of Private School / Institutions, Sindh Education & Literacy Department ----------- Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shah, learned Additional Advocate General Sindh, undertakes to file comments before the next date of hearing with advance copy to learned counsel for the petitioners. He points out that there is a serious apprehension that privately managed schools may expel the students or may take other coercive action against them in case of non-payment of full tuition fee due to the present dispute / situation. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that none of the petitioners will take any coercive action against any of the students who are unable to pay full tuition fee because of the prevailing situation / dispute. Learned counsel for the petitioners requests that other similar petitions filed by him may also be taken up along with this case on the next date. At his request, office is directed to fix other similar matters, if any, for orders / hearing along with present petition on the next date of hearing. By consent, adjourned to 29.04.2020 at 11:00 a.m. Interim order passed earlier to continue till the next date of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
